app.name: Incode Identity Verification
app.short_description: Trigger Incode biometric identity verification on the ticket requester with one click.
app.long_description: Lets a Zendesk Support agent send the ticket requester a secure Incode identity verification link (SMS + email). Verification results are written back to the ticket via ZIS — three custom fields plus an internal note — so agents can confidently proceed with sensitive actions.
app.installation_instructions: Configure your Incode API key, environment (sandbox/production), configuration ID, ZIS ingest URL, and notification mode. Three custom ticket fields will be provisioned automatically.
app.title: Incode Identity Verification

incodeApiKey.label: Incode API key
incodeApiKey.helpText: The B2B API key from your Incode tenant. Stored securely.

incodeEnvironment.label: Environment
incodeEnvironment.helpText: Either 'sandbox' (routes to demo-api.incode.com) or 'production' (routes to api.incode.com).

incodeConfigurationId.label: Configuration ID
incodeConfigurationId.helpText: The Incode onboarding flow configuration ID to use.

msg_pending.label: Pending message
msg_pending.helpText: Shown in the sidebar while verification is in progress.

msg_success.label: Success message
msg_success.helpText: Shown in the sidebar and posted as an internal note when verification succeeds.

msg_failed.label: Failure message
msg_failed.helpText: Shown in the sidebar and posted as an internal note when verification fails.

zisIngestUrl.label: ZIS ingest URL
zisIngestUrl.helpText: The Zendesk Integration Services inbound webhook URL (from zcli zis:upload). Stored securely.
